sanskrit: रुद्राणां शङ्करश्चास्मि वित्तेशो यक्षरक्षसाम् । वसूनां पावकश्चास्मि मेरुः शिखरिणामहम् ॥
hindiTranslation: रुद्रोंमें शंकर और यक्षराक्षसोंमें कुबेर मैं हूँ । वसुओंमें पावक अग्नि और शिखरवाले पर्वतोंमें सुमेरु मैं हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: Among the Rudras, I am Shankara; among the Yakshas and Rakshasas, I am Kubera. Among the Vasus, I am fire, and among mountain peaks, I am Mount Meru.
essence: Greatness in the world is a visible sign of Krishna's presence.
speaker: Krishna
